english: Om — The Purusha has a thousand heads, a thousand eyes, a thousand feet
roman: Om Sahasra shirsha Purushah sahasrakshasya sahasrapat

english: He pervades the earth on all sides and extends ten fingers beyond
roman: Sa bhumim sarvatah spritva atyatishthad dashangulam

hindi: पुरुष एवेदं सर्वं यद्भूतं यच्च भव्यम्।
english: This whole universe is the Purusha — all that has been and all that will be
roman: Purusha evedam sarvam yadbhutam yaccha bhavyam

english: He is also the lord of immortality, who grows by food
roman: Utam rittvasya Ishaano yad annenati rohati

english: Such is his greatness, yet the Purusha is even greater than this
roman: Etavanas ya mahima ato jyayan shcha Purushaha

english: All beings are one quarter of him, and three quarters of him is immortal in heaven
roman: Pado asya sarva bhutani tri padasy amritam divi

english: The Brahmin was his mouth, the arms were made the Kshatriya
roman: Brahmano asya mukham asid bahu Rajanyah kritah

hindi: ऊरू तदस्य यद्वैश्यः पद्भ्यां शूद्रो अजायत॥
english: His thighs became the Vaishya, from his feet the Shudra was born
roman: Uru tadasy a yadvaishyah padbhyam Shudro ajayata
